text: Hey, just finalized the deck for tomorrow's presentation. Could you proofread the financials section? I'm worried I might have swapped two numbers.
Bro, did you see that guy try to parallel park his giant SUV into a compact spot? Took him 5 minutes and he still ended up on the curb. 🤣
I can't believe you ate the last of the leftover lasagna again. I literally wrote my name on the container. That was for my lunch tomorrow.
Your tree's branches are scraping against my roof every time the wind picks up. I've asked twice now. If it's not trimmed by next week, I'm going to have to involve the HOA.
For the study guide, I think problem 3 is a misprint. The variable 'k' isn't defined anywhere in the chapter. Anyone else get that, or am I just fried?
Burrito place or the ramen spot for lunch? I'm leaning toward burritos, but I know you wanted that spicy miso. No rush, just need to decide before 11:30.
Since you're 'too busy' to do your dishes, they're now in a plastic bag on your bed. You can deal with them when you get home. I'm not your maid.
Okay, hear me out: what if the app didn't just log expenses, but used AI to predict where we're bleeding money each month? Like, 'You spent 40% more on coffee this week, Dave.'
I respect your point about the new policy, but I think you're ignoring the impact on the junior staff. It's not just about efficiency; morale matters too.
Can you believe the landlord is raising rent again? With no improvements. The hallway carpet still smells like the previous tenant's cat. This city is a joke.
Hey, just a heads up — I noticed the dishes are piling up again. Would be great if we could all chip in a bit more. Thanks!
Who's bringing snacks to the library at 6? I can grab chips and dip if someone else brings drinks.
Pineapple on pizza is objectively disgusting. It's a texture thing, and you know it.
Can you believe Karen in accounting took credit for my spreadsheet? I spent 3 hours on that.
Mom always liked you best, and you know it. That's why she asked you to host Thanksgiving instead of me.
Running 5 minutes late, just hit traffic on the 101. Save me a seat by the window?
Actually, I think your approach to the project timeline is too aggressive. We need more buffer for testing.
Ok but seriously, who left the milk out overnight? It's curdled. Not naming names, but I have suspicions.
I'll take the left side of the whiteboard for brainstorming the marketing funnel. You tackle the user personas?
This commute is literally killing me. 45 minutes each way for what? A slightly better coffee machine?
Hey, I don't mean to be that guy, but could you maybe not play TikTok at full volume in the living room at 11 PM?
Section 3 of the chem notes is confusing me — did the professor say the reaction was endothermic or exothermic?
You can't seriously think pineapple belongs on pizza. It's a fruit. Pizza is savory. End of story.
If I hear one more person say 'let's circle back' in this meeting, I'm going to lose it.
Stop trying to change the venue. We always go to your favorite restaurant. It's my turn to pick the spot for Dad's birthday.
Want to split the lunch order from that new Thai place? I'm getting pad thai and spring rolls.
I respect your opinion on the budget allocation, but I have data showing the marketing spend drives more conversions.
You left the toilet seat up again. It's not that hard, dude. Basic roommate courtesy.
For the case study, I can cover the competitive analysis if you do the financial projections. Deal?
The landlord raised rent again and didn't even fix the leaky faucet. When do we write that passive-aggressive email?
